You're spending money.
Can you prove it's booking jobs?

What's causing it
4 sources found
Critical
34% of calls missed or unanswered
No callback system · Est. $84K/yr lost
Critical
Zero follow-up on unbooked estimates
68% of quotes sent, never followed up · Est. $112K/yr
Critical
No conversion tracking on paid ads
$4,200/mo Google Ads · Can't prove a single booked job
High
Slow mobile site cutting form volume
6.2s load time · Losing visitors before they see the number

Find Out What You're Losing
Finding 01
67%

of home service owners cannot connect their ad spend to a single booked job

Built on Tenth field analysis · 2025

Finding 02
32%

of inbound calls go unanswered. No voicemail, no callback, revenue just walks away

Average across 300+ audited companies

Finding 03
68%

of estimates sent to homeowners never get a follow-up call from the office

Estimate follow-up study · 2024–2025

Case Example
$247K

in annual revenue leakage found in a single audit of a $2.3M/yr HVAC company

Revenue Leak Audit · single case · 2025

The Problem
📊
🔧
67%
of owners can't connect ad spend to booked jobs

You don't have a lead problem.
You have a visibility problem.

Most owners can tell you what they spend each month. Very few can tell you which channel booked the job, where calls were lost, how much revenue died in follow-up, or whether the agency is helping or hiding.

If you can't trace booked jobs back to their source, you are not measuring marketing. You are guessing.
💸

"I'm spending money but I can't see what's working."

Your agency shows impressions and clicks. You need to see cost per booked job. That's the only number that matters when you're running trucks.

📞

"My calls aren't booking."

It's usually not the lead source. It's that nobody trained your front desk to handle the call. The calls are coming in. They're just not converting.

🔥

"I tried agencies before and got burned."

Every agency has a financial incentive to recommend more ad spend. We don't run ads, don't manage campaigns, don't earn a commission on anything.

Example: 300 calls/month with a 32% miss rate
300
calls/month
×
32%
miss rate
×
42%
close rate
×
$1,800
avg ticket
=
$73K
leaking every month
from missed calls alone
See Your Number Get the Full Audit
How We Work

We do not run your ads.
We show you what your ad spend is actually doing.

Agencies get paid whether your calls book or not. Our job is different. We look at the numbers, the phone process, the follow-up, the website, and the competitors. Then we show you where revenue is leaking.

What you're evaluating
Typical Agency
Built on Tenth
What they measure
Leads and clicks
Booked jobs and cost per job
Financial incentive
Earn more when you spend more
Fixed fee. Zero incentive to upsell spend
When they get paid
Monthly retainer regardless of results
Fixed scope. You pay once, you own it
What they deliver
Monthly report with impressions and CTR
Written analysis. Every gap in dollar terms
Phone performance
Not their problem
Analyzed in detail. Scripts and systems included
If nothing improves
They keep billing
We show you exactly why and what to fix
📈
01 · Research

We Map What the Best Companies Do

We look at what the top-performing HVAC, roofing, and plumbing companies do differently: how they run ads, handle calls, follow up on estimates. Hundreds of companies across 15+ US markets.

🔍
02 · Diagnose

We Find Your Leaks in Dollars

Not "your phone answer rate needs improvement." Instead: "at your call volume and ticket size, your answer rate is costing you $84,000/year." Every gap gets a dollar figure attached.

🔧
03 · Fix It

We Hand You the Exact Playbook

Phone script for your front desk. Follow-up sequence for cold estimates. Weekly dashboard your office manager runs in 10 minutes. Everything in writing. No calls, no agency needed.

Free Tools

Start with the leak.
Then decide what to fix.

Most owners use the free tools first. Put in your real numbers: calls per month, ad spend, answer rate, number of techs. See exactly where money is slipping through. The audit is for when you want the full picture in writing.

Suggested order: Start with Phone Revenue first, then Marketing Cost, then Lead Source Grader.
📊
Free Tool

Marketing Cost Calculator

Put in your monthly ad spend, how many calls you get, your close rate, and average ticket. See your real cost per booked job. See whether it's in line with the top 25% of companies in your trade.

Calculate your numbers
📞
Free Tool

Phone Revenue Calculator

How many calls are you missing every month? Put in your call volume and answer rate. We'll show you the dollar amount walking out the door. See what happens if you get your answer rate to 90%.

See your lost revenue
🎯
Free Tool

Agency Report Card

Answer 10 yes or no questions about what your agency actually reports today. See whether they are measuring booked jobs or hiding behind easier numbers.

Grade your agency
🔍
Free Tool

Website Conversion Audit

Enter your website URL. We pull your real PageSpeed score and check whether your phone number is prominent, your CTAs are clear, and your site would actually make a homeowner call. Takes 30 seconds.

Audit your website
📋
Free Tool

Revenue Per Technician Benchmarker

Enter your trade, team size, and annual revenue to see whether each tech is producing at benchmark or leaving a large team-wide gap on the table.

Benchmark your team
📬

Build the system.
Improve it for 90 days.

No long-term contract. No monthly retainer. No calls unless you want one. Every engagement delivers a written report with every finding in dollars and every action prioritized. Most clients see the ROI in the first month.

📄
Start here
Revenue Leak Audit
$750

In 7 days you'll know exactly what your marketing is producing and what it's wasting. Every finding shown in dollars. Not clicks, not impressions. Dollars.

  • Which channels produce booked jobs vs. burn cash
  • Where calls leak before, during, and after they come in
  • What your top competitors are doing that you're not
  • Every gap translated into annual revenue impact
  • Prioritized action list: what to fix first, second, third
Best first step if you're not sure where the waste is

📐
Then build the system
Growth System Blueprint
$3,000

The audit shows what's broken. The blueprint fixes it. Your front desk gets a word-for-word phone script. Your team gets a follow-up system for dead estimates. Your manager gets a 10-minute weekly dashboard. No agency needed.

  • Phone scripts your CSR uses Monday to book more jobs
  • 5-touch follow-up sequence for estimates that didn't close
  • Weekly dashboard: cost per booked job by channel
  • 90-day calendar with specific weekly actions
  • Includes the full Revenue Leak Audit
Most owners start here after the audit

🤝
Then improve it with us
90-Day Growth Advisory
$7,500

Audit and blueprint included. Then for 90 days we watch your numbers with you, every week, in writing. If something stops working, we tell you what to change and why. You're never left guessing what to do next.

  • Weekly written review: what's working, what to change
  • Questions answered within 24–48 hours every week
  • Monthly competitor re-benchmarking as the gap closes
  • Exit report showing exactly what changed, in dollars
  • Includes audit + blueprint delivery in week 1
Best if you want weekly pressure-testing and accountability
